input.command:
curl -s -X POST "https://api.relay.link/currencies/v2" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chainIds":[8453],"defaultList":true,"limit":200}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print(type(d), repr(d)[:200])
"
